name: Apricot Horseradish Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Freshly grated or prepared White horseradish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the apricot jam and white horseradish in a mixing bowl.
2. Whisk until smooth.
3. Whisk in the fresh lime juice, salt, and pepper.
4. If not serving immediately, transfer the sauce to a glass jar with a nonmetallic lid and refrigerate. It will keep for several weeks.
